title: Please Open GitLab integration info Group Projects
excerpt: I love the fact that Monday has an integration with GitLab. But it doesn’t integrate with Group projects on GitLab, only personal projects. This means that we can’t use the integration within our company, which is a majo…

posts.author: drothamel (Daniel Rothamel)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the fact that Monday has an integration with GitLab. But it doesn’t integrate with Group projects on GitLab, only personal projects. This means that we can’t use the integration within our company, which is a major bummer. As an IT consultancy, we use GitLab for our technical project management, but we often use Monday to give our clients visibility into project progress. We really would love to be able to integrate the two.

posts.author: mebassett (Meb)
posts.cookedHtml: yes, please! We also need this feature. Personal projects are a great demo but for a business with a team its useless.

posts.author: craiggiles.dialog (Craig Giles)
posts.cookedHtml:
@drothamel @mebassett
Keen to know more about features that you would like to see with a gitlab integration.
We are currently working on building an integration for gitlab that will work for business and group projects.

posts.author: baswienhoven (Bas Wienhoven)
posts.cookedHtml:
@drothamel @mebassett @craiggiles.dialog We just release a new version of our GitLab integration that adds support for GitLab Self-Managed and can handle group projects!

Check it out on the monday.com marketplace. If you have any questions or feature ideas, please share them with us!
